metadata_artifact.description: Page numbers, chapter headings, publisher info, etc.

too_short_artifact.description: Less than 30 chars, not meaningful knowledge

variant_reading.description: High overlap with existing Silver content, different edition

potentially_missing.action: INVESTIGATE - may be missing canonical knowledge
potentially_missing.description: No overlap with existing Silver, needs evidence search

partial_match.description: Some overlap with Silver but not enough to classify
